subcodes.first_line: O wise one! Wisdom is the light of guidance, and healing is the antidote of the love of Bahá. As far as thou art able, [dispense] this divine elixir [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حکیم حکمت نور هدی است و طبابت دریاق حب بها تا توانی این معجون رحمانی را
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @love of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
